article_meta.title: Cartoon Carousel The nation’s cartoonists on the week in politics Every week political cartoonists throughout the countr

reasoning: The model flagged genuine instances from the author’s prose with no attribution violations and mostly appropriate labels, but it missed multiple clear additional bias instances present throughout the piece.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are in the author’s voice; no quoted or attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged items are defensible author-level bias (sweeping assertions, loaded metaphors/adjectives, evaluative framing).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several clear instances in author prose such as: ‘Democrats and Republicans ... complete agreement: McCarthyism is back,’ ‘infamous speech,’ ‘media frenzy,’ ‘drunken haze,’ ‘unscrupulous investigations,’ and ‘repackaged ... as a political weapon.’
